app.name: Cost Center
app.description: Cost Center — consumption, billing and cost across Dynatrace capabilities.

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Read rate card configuration (OAuth credentials) from app settings

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: Query log ingestion data from Grail

scopes.name: storage:metrics:read
scopes.comment: Query metrics and billing usage data from Grail

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: Query entity data (hosts, K8s, cloud) from Grail

scopes.name: storage:system:read
scopes.comment: Query dt.system.events for billing usage data

scopes.name: environment-api:metrics:read
scopes.comment: Read metric series via Environment API
